title: athyrium × glabrescens
intro: Athyrium × glabrescens, also known as the Lady Fern or Glabrous Lady Fern, is a hybrid plant species in the Athyrium genus, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system. Athyrium × glabrescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
